2606.30139.title: Relevance Is Not Permission: Warranted Attention for Value Contributions
2606.30139.paper_summary: Relevance is not permission. Attention lets a model read key-value items related to the current query, but it does not guarantee that the value contribution of such an item becomes prediction evidence. A retrieved passage may be relevant to a question without being supporting evidence, and a historical fact or temporal neighbor may even blur true-tail ranking or the current edge score. This paper formalizes this gap as a permission problem for the weighted value term alpha_ij * v_j that is actually added to the prediction path. We propose Warrant, a path-localized interface that preserves attention relevance alpha_ij, exposes the value path leading to the primary metric, and, in the full model, turns alpha_ij * v_j into alpha_ij * g_ij * v_j through learned query-item permission g_ij. We place the same operator on the metric-defining value paths of CTDG link prediction, MTPP next-mark ranking, RAG supporting evidence selection, STPP next-location forecasting, and TKG tail prediction. Across 32 paired comparisons, 3 seeds, and 192 total runs, Warrant improves the primary metric in 27 comparisons; practical tiers consist of 10 substantial effects, 1 marginal effect, 8 positive but uncertain effects, 8 tie/negligible effects, and 5 drops. In the path-localization check, correct-path placement outperforms direction-aware Base performance in every domain and exceeds generic attention placement by +0.1076 AUC in CTDG and +0.0683 MRR in TKG. Ablations show that most TKG gains come from historical-tail value path exposure, whereas the core CTDG gain comes from edge-conditioned query-item permission. In conclusion, prediction evidence is not attention mass. A weighted value term becomes evidence only when it is warranted on the path to the metric.
2606.30139.paper_summary_zh: 相關性並不等於許可。注意力讓模型能夠讀取與當前查詢相關的鍵值項目，但這並不保證這樣一個項目的值貢獻會成為預測證據。檢索到的段落可能與問題相關，但並不一定是支持證據，而歷史事實或時間鄰近項甚至可能模糊真實的尾部排名或當前的邊緣分數。本文將這一差距形式化為加權值項 alpha_ij * v_j 的許可問題，該項實際上被添加到預測路徑中。我們提出了 Warrant，一個路徑本地化介面，保留注意力相關性 alpha_ij，揭示通往主要指標的值路徑，並在完整模型中，通過學習的查詢-項目許可 g_ij 將 alpha_ij * v_j 轉換為 alpha_ij * g_ij * v_j。我們在 CTDG 連結預測、MTPP 下一標記排名、RAG 支持證據選擇、STPP 下一位置預測和 TKG 尾部預測的指標定義值路徑上放置相同的運算符。在 32 次配對比較、3 個隨機種子和 192 次總運行中，Warrant 在 27 次比較中改善了主要指標；實際層級包括 10 個顯著效果、1 個邊際效果、8 個正面但不確定的效果、8 個平局/微不足道的效果和 5 個下降。在路徑本地化檢查中，正確路徑的放置在每個領域中都超越了方向感知基準性能，並在 CTDG 中超過了通用注意力放置 +0.1076 AUC，在 TKG 中超過了 +0.0683 MRR。消融實驗顯示，大多數 TKG 增益來自歷史尾部值路徑的曝光，而核心 CTDG 增益來自邊緣條件的查詢-項目許可。總之，預測證據並不是注意力質量。只有當加權值項在通往指標的路徑上被授權時，它才會成為證據。
2606.30139.author: Minwoo Yu et.al.
